title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
